scores.correctness_notes: The agent correctly demonstrates the requires side using IngressPerAppRequirer with proper setup, event handling, and URL retrieval. While the gold standard focuses on the data schema layer, the agent's Python API demonstration is accurate and more practically useful.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — IngressPerAppRequirer, IngressPerAppReadyEvent, IngressPerAppRevokedEvent, url property, is_ready() method, and parameters (port, strip_prefix, redirect_https, scheme) all exist in the real traefik-k8s v2 ingress library
